name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial offers secured and unsecured personal loans from $1,500–$30,000 at fixed rates of 11.99%–35.99% APR, with over 100 years in lending.
description_long:
OneMain Financial is one of the oldest consumer lending companies in the United States, operating for over 100 years. With a nationwide branch network, the company serves borrowers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans, offering a mix of in-person, online, and phone-based service. Their W Flagler St location in Miami, FL is one of many branches where applicants can meet face-to-face with a loan specialist.

OneMain offers both secured and unsecured personal loans ranging from $1,500 to $30,000, with repayment terms of 24 to 60 months. Fixed APRs run from 11.99% to 35.99%. Borrowers can use funds for a wide range of purposes including debt consolidation, medical bills, emergency expenses, home improvement, auto purchase or repair, weddings, vacations, moving, motorcycles, RVs, boats, and funeral costs. Applications can be submitted online, by phone, or in a branch.

OneMain's standout feature is SpeedFunds, which allows approved borrowers to receive funds in as little as one hour after loan closing via an eligible bank-issued debit card — unusually fast for a traditional lender. Prequalification is available without a hard credit inquiry, so applicants can check for offers without impacting their credit score. The company also offers after-hours branch appointments, a practical accommodation for working borrowers. All loans carry fixed rates and fixed monthly payments with no prepayment penalties.

OneMain Financial is a legitimate option for borrowers with imperfect credit who need a meaningful loan amount and value the option of in-person support. However, the upper APR of 35.99% is nearly as high as many credit cards, meaning less-qualified applicants may pay dearly for access to capital. The minimum loan of $1,500 rules out micro-borrowing, and the $30,000 ceiling is lower than what some online lenders offer. For creditworthy borrowers, lower-cost alternatives likely exist, but OneMain's 100+ year track record and branch infrastructure provide reliability and accountability that many online-only lenders cannot match.
address: 9821 Northlake Centre Pkwy Ste E, Charlotte, NC 28216

company_info.headquarters: 9821 Northlake Centre Pkwy Ste E, Charlotte, NC 28216

pros: Over 100 years in consumer lending — established, regulated, and accountable
SpeedFunds: approved borrowers can receive money in as little as 1 hour after closing via debit card
Prequalification check does not affect your credit score
No prepayment fees on any loan
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments — no variable-rate surprises
Both secured and unsecured personal loans available ($1,500–$30,000)
After-hours branch appointments and multiple application channels (online, phone, in-branch)
cons: APR ceiling of 35.99% approaches credit card rates for less-qualified borrowers
Minimum loan of $1,500 — not suitable for very small borrowing needs
Maximum loan of $30,000 is lower than many competing online personal loan lenders
Rate floor of 11.99% is higher than what banks or credit unions offer well-qualified borrowers
Loan closing may require gathering multiple documents (ID, proof of residence, proof of income)
best_for: Borrowers with fair or imperfect credit who need $1,500–$30,000
Consumers who prefer in-person service and want to speak with a loan specialist face-to-face
Borrowers needing fast funding after approval — same-day via SpeedFunds debit disbursement
Debt consolidation or emergency expense borrowers who don't qualify at a bank or credit union
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for borrowers with fair-to-poor credit who need a lump-sum loan between $1,500 and $30,000 and value the option of in-person branch support or fast funding. The main caveat is cost: rates up to 35.99% APR mean this is an expensive option, and creditworthy borrowers should compare online lenders or credit unions before committing.
services: Moving, wedding, vacation, and motorcycle loans
RV, boat, pool, and funeral loans
Online prequalification with no credit score impact
